backend/main.mo: Main actor for the US Repeater Network backend, defining repeater/user data types, geographic zip coordinate lookup, role-based access control, and canister endpoints for managing repeaters, favorites, and user profiles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines old and new actor state shapes (repeaters, user profiles, favorites, admin principal) and a `run` function that passes state through unchanged for schema upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (CHIRP CSV parser, batch CSV import, directory pagination fix, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'US Repeater Network' and mounting the app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, directory, submit, admin, favorites, profile), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a shared RootLayout with Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AdminPassphraseG: Gate component that requires the user to be authenticated and enter a UI passphrase before accessing admin content; on success it calls `registerAdmin` on the backend and re-checks admin status before rendering children.
frontend/src/components/ApprovedRepeater: Admin component that lists approved repeaters with their details and provides a delete action with confirmation dialog for each entry.
frontend/src/components/FavoriteButton.t: A star icon button component for toggling a repeater's favorite status, with optional tooltip support when the button is disabled.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: A filter toolbar with search input, state selector, and mode selector for filtering the repeater directory, along with a result count display.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying branding, quick navigation links, compatibility info, and a copyright line with a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links (including admin-only routes), and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/PendingRepeaters: Admin component that displays pending repeater submissions as cards with approve and reject action buttons for each entry.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog component for first-time user profile setup, collecting display name, call sign, and bio, then saving via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RepeaterCard.tsx: A card component that displays summary info for a repeater (call sign, location, frequency, offset, CTCSS tone, status) with a favorite toggle button.
frontend/src/components/RepeaterDetailMo: A modal dialog that shows full details of a selected repeater including frequency, offset, CTCSS tone, location, and other metadata in a structured layout.
frontend/src/components/RepeaterForm.tsx: A form component for submitting a new repeater entry, with validation for frequency, offset, call sign, location, and optional tone/mode fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, admin operations, repeater CRUD, favorites, and infinite scroll pagination.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Orbitron and Inter fonts, and defines a navy/charcoal dark theme with custom CSS variables for a ham radio aesthetic.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page showing pending and approved repeater counts in tabs, with logout functionality and an admin passphrase gate for access control.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin-only page for bulk importing repeaters from a CHIRP CSV file, with drag-and-drop upload, parse preview, and batched backend submission with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/DirectoryPage.tsx: Public repeater directory page with infinite scroll, client-side filtering by state/mode/search, and a detail modal, normalizing state names to abbreviations for consistent filtering.
frontend/src/pages/FavoritesPage.tsx: Authenticated page displaying a user's favorited repeaters in a grid, with login prompt for unauthenticated users and toggle support for adding/removing favorites.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section, feature grid, and call-to-action buttons linking to the repeater directory and GMRS submission form.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page that lets authenticated Internet Identity users view and save their display name, call sign, and bio.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitPage.tsx: Form page for authenticated users to submit a new GMRS/ham repeater with frequency, location, tone, and operational details for admin review.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitRepeaterPage.ts: Alternative repeater submission page using a shared RepeaterForm component, with login-required guard and a post-submission success state.
frontend/src/services/hamInfoApi.ts: Service layer that defines TypeScript interfaces for the haminfo.tetranz.com REST API and provides helpers to normalize raw repeater data (mode detection, tone extraction, state mappings).
frontend/src/services/repeaterBookApi.ts: Empty or stub file for a planned RepeaterBook API service layer.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Parses CHIRP CSV export files into a structured `ParsedRepeater` format, handling column mapping, CTCSS/DCS tone normalization, and city/state extraction with full US state name-to-abbreviation support.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom ham-radio design tokens (amber/navy/teal colors, Orbitron/JetBrains Mono fonts, amber glow shadows) and enabling animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a CHIRP CSV repeater import app on the Internet Computer, documenting existing features, known issues (e.g., only 17 of 4000+ repeaters displaying), and architectural notes about canister-based storage.
